Dynamical systems are self maintaining evolving systems of which life is a type of

== See Also ==

* [[Great chain of being]]
* [[Bioeconomy]]

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Dynamical systems]][[Category:Dynamical systems]]

[[sn:Dynamical systems]][[Category:Systems theory]]
[[Category:Life]]
[[Category:Pages]]
